segments.title: Link Component Hydration Warning Analysis
segments.summary: Hydration warning identified in the Link component, separate from the Radix issues. The warning occurs because the link prefetch logic mutates attributes after the first paint, creating a race condition with hydration on slow networks.
actions: Justin: Analyze Link component hydration warning

segments.title: Prefetch Logic Fix Implementation
segments.summary: Solution identified to fix the Link component hydration warning by guarding the prefetch logic with `typeof window !== 'undefined'` and scheduling it after hydration. This prevents the race condition by ensuring the logic only runs on the client side after hydration is complete.
actions: Justin: Guard prefetch logic with typeof window check

segments.title: Issue Prioritization and Documentation
segments.summary: Decision to file an issue for the Link component hydration warning and defer it until after Alpha 4 unless it becomes user-facing. The issue will be documented in the worklog for future reference.
decisions: File issue and defer until after Alpha 4
